name: Icon Callout Box Section
best_for: Supporting 'proof point' statements (dosing convenience, time-to-effect, etc.).
notes: Light Blue #E6F0F9 box inset from left by W/2 (40px); white icon badge (80px, 48px icon) straddling the left edge with drop shadow; box radius 40px 8px 40px 8px, badge radius 20px 4px 20px 4px; section padding 16px 25px, box padding 26px 34px 26px 64px. Outlook degrades absolute positioning — pre-composited PNG recommended.
